hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json,subprocess; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); subprocess.run(['ruff','format',p]) if p.endswith('.py') else None"

python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); print(json.dumps({'decision':'block','reason':'DROP TABLE is forbidden - use Alembic migrations for schema changes (alembic/versions/ is off-limits for direct edits).'})) if 'DROP TABLE' in cmd.upper() else None"
